name: Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells jewelry and jewelry accessories. The company also imports and sells jewelry. As of August 31, 2018, it operated 87 stores, which included 84 stores in Japan and 3 stores internationally. The company was formerly known as SADAMATSU Company Limited and changed its name to Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd. in March 2018. Festaria Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1920 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
